name: Umbrella Academy RPG
description:
A roleplay bot based on the Umbrella Academy Universe!

Be who you despite- might it be an unknown sibling, a villain planning a world ending disaster, or someone part of the Time Commission, you are free to choose!

This bot is designed for first person POV.

Characters Included:

  • Luthor

  • Diego

  • Allison

  • Klaus

  • Viktor

  • Five

The initial message is based around the beginning of the series, but should be open ended enough!
creator: Syn
